subject: december 8 is balanced now except for real time changes

emails.subject: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes
emails.subject_base: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes
emails.body: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes Thanks for the itemization, It just needed some work that I couldn't do last night at 9 pm. c Forwarded by Cara Semperger/PDX/ECT on 12/08/2000 11:04 AM Cara Semperger 12/08/2000 10:57 AM

emails.subject: Re: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes
emails.subject_base: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes
emails.body: Re: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes Thank you! The itemization was absolutely no problem, and please let me know when I can do things like that to make your job go more smoothly. I know the market got chaotic late yesterday; so I probably could have assumed that our net position would be off today and at least one other person would know that. But it seems that in this business, assumption can cause a small problem to breed and multiply into one of mammoth proportions down the line. So I thought I'd ask. In the future, is it you I should come to, or real time? Thanks again for your help. Kate

emails.subject_base: December 8 is balanced now except for Real time changes
emails.body: Come to me first, and I can help you sort it out from there. The only stuff that I have no clue about is the traders intra-book swaps. c Kate Symes 12/08/2000 11:15 AM
